name: SEVKNUMATA
definition:
CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[SEVKNUMATA]
	@PB_REF INT,@TYPE INT,@ORDER INT
AS
SET NOCOUNT ON
DECLARE @MSJ AS NVARCHAR(1000) SET @MSJ=''
DECLARE @SB_REF int
DECLARE @FIRMA_REF int
DECLARE @AK NVARCHAR(100)
DECLARE @PREF int
DECLARE @NUMARA int


DECLARE @C AS INT
DECLARE @MAXT AS DATETIME 
DECLARE @NMR AS INT

BEGIN TRANSACTION  BEGIN TRY 

--SB_REF E GÖRE
IF @TYPE=0 BEGIN
DECLARE MY_CURSOR CURSOR 
  LOCAL STATIC READ_ONLY FORWARD_ONLY
FOR 
SELECT DISTINCT PF.AMBAR_KODU,PH.SB_REF,PF.PB_REF,(SELECT NUMARA FROM SEVKBEKLEME WITH(NOLOCK) WHERE AMBAR_KODU=PF.AMBAR_KODU AND STATUS=0 AND BLOKE=0 AND ISNULL(MIKTAR,0)>0 AND SB_REF=PH.SB_REF AND ISNULL(FIRMA_REF,0)=0)NUMARA
	FROM PLANLAMAFISLERI PF WITH(NOLOCK) 
	LEFT OUTER JOIN PLANLAMAHAREKETLERI   PH WITH(NOLOCK) ON PF.PB_REF=PH.PB_REF  
	WHERE   PH.PB_REF=@PB_REF

OPEN MY_CURSOR
FETCH NEXT FROM MY_CURSOR INTO @AK,@SB_REF,@PREF,@NUMARA
WHILE @@FETCH_STATUS = 0
BEGIN 

    IF @NUMARA IS NOT NULL
		BEGIN
			--SİPARİŞE NUMARA ATAMASI VAR LINKREFS GÜNCELLENİYOR
			UPDATE SEVKBEKLEME SET MIKTAR=ISNULL(MIKTAR,0)+1,LINKREFS=ISNULL(LINKREFS,'')+'['+CONVERT(NVARCHAR,@PREF)+']'  WHERE STATUS=0 AND BLOKE=0 AND ISNULL(FIRMA_REF,0)=0 AND AMBAR_KODU=@AK AND NUMARA=@NUMARA AND CHARINDEX('['+CONVERT(NVARCHAR,@PREF)+']',ISNULL(LINKREFS,''),0)=0
		END
	ELSE
		BEGIN
			--YENİ ATAMA YAPILACAK
			 
			SET @C=ISNULL((SELECT TOP 1 NUMARA FROM SEVKBEKLEME WITH(NOLOCK) WHERE STATUS=0 AND BLOKE=0 AND AMBAR_KODU=@AK AND ISNULL(FIRMA_REF,0)=0 ),0)
			 
			--SELECT @C,@AK
			IF @C=0 
				BEGIN	
					SET @MSJ='MAKSİMUM SEVK BEKLEME ATAMASI YAPILMIŞ. AMBAR KODU=' + @AK
					GOTO ERR0 
				END
			ELSE
				BEGIN
					SET @NMR=NULL
					SELECT @MAXT=MAX(ATAMA_TARIHI) FROM SEVKBEKLEME WITH(NOLOCK) WHERE STATUS=0 AND BLOKE=0 AND AMBAR_KODU=@AK AND ISNULL(FIRMA_REF,0)=0 
					IF @MAXT IS NULL OR @ORDER=1 BEGIN
						BB0:
						SELECT TOP 1 @NMR=NUMARA FROM SEVKBEKLEME WITH(NOLOCK)  WHERE STATUS=0 AND BLOKE=0 AND AMBAR_KODU=@AK AND ISNULL(MIKTAR,0)=0 AND ISNULL(FIRMA_REF,0)=0 ORDER BY NUMARA 
						IF @NMR IS NULL 
							BEGIN	
								SET @MSJ='MAKSİMUM SEVK BEKLEME ATAMASI YAPILMIŞ.AMBAR KODU=' + @AK
								GOTO ERR0 
							END
						END
					ELSE
						BEGIN
							SELECT TOP 1 @NMR=NUMARA FROM SEVKBEKLEME WITH(NOLOCK) WHERE STATUS=0 AND BLOKE=0 AND AMBAR_KODU=@AK  AND ISNULL(MIKTAR,0)=0 AND ISNULL(FIRMA_REF,0)=0
								AND NUMARA >ISNULL((SELECT TOP 1 NUMARA FROM SEVKBEKLEME WITH(NOLOCK)  WHERE STATUS=0 AND BLOKE=0 AND AMBAR_KODU=@AK AND ISNULL(FIRMA_REF,0)=0 AND ATAMA_TARIHI=@MAXT ORDER BY NUMARA DESC ),0)
							ORDER BY NUMARA 
							IF @NMR IS NULL GOTO BB0
						END

					UPDATE SEVKBEKLEME SET SB_REF=@SB_REF ,MIKTAR=1,LINKREFS='['+CONVERT(NVARCHAR,@PREF)+']',ATAMA_TARIHI=GETDATE() WHERE NUMARA=@NMR  AND STATUS=0 AND BLOKE=0 AND AMBAR_KODU=@AK AND ISNULL(FIRMA_REF,0)=0

					--SELECT @NMR 
				END
		END

    --SELECT  @SB_REF, @AK,@PREF,@NUMARA
    FETCH NEXT FROM MY_CURSOR INTO @AK,@SB_REF,@PREF,@NUMARA
END
ERR0:
CLOSE MY_CURSOR
DEALLOCATE MY_CURSOR
END

--FIRMA REF E GÖRE
IF @TYPE=1 BEGIN
DECLARE MY_CURSOR CURSOR 
  LOCAL STATIC READ_ONLY FORWARD_ONLY
FOR 
SELECT DISTINCT PF.AMBAR_KODU,SP.FIRMA_REF,PF.PB_REF,(SELECT NUMARA FROM SEVKBEKLEME WITH(NOLOCK) WHERE AMBAR_KODU=PF.AMBAR_KODU AND STATUS=0 AND BLOKE=0 AND ISNULL(MIKTAR,0)>0 AND FIRMA_REF=PH.FIRMA_REF AND ISNULL(SB_REF,0)=0)NUMARA
	FROM PLANLAMAFISLERI PF WITH(NOLOCK) 
	LEFT OUTER JOIN PLANLAMAHAREKETLERI   PH WITH(NOLOCK) ON PF.PB_REF=PH.PB_REF  
	LEFT OUTER JOIN SIPARISFISLERI		  SP WITH(NOLOCK) ON SP.SB_REF=PH.SB_REF  
	WHERE   PH.PB_REF=@PB_REF

OPEN MY_CURSOR
FETCH NEXT FROM MY_CURSOR INTO @AK,@FIRMA_REF,@PREF,@NUMARA
WHILE @@FETCH_STATUS = 0
BEGIN 

    IF @NUMARA IS NOT NULL
		BEGIN
			--SİPARİŞE NUMARA ATAMASI VAR LINKREFS GÜNCELLENİYOR
			UPDATE SEVKBEKLEME SET MIKTAR=ISNULL(MIKTAR,0)+1,LINKREFS=ISNULL(LINKREFS,'')+'['+CONVERT(NVARCHAR,@PREF)+']'  WHERE STATUS=0 AND BLOKE=0 AND ISNULL(SB_REF,0)=0 AND AMBAR_KODU=@AK AND NUMARA=@NUMARA AND CHARINDEX('['+CONVERT(NVARCHAR,@PREF)+']',ISNULL(LINKREFS,''),0)=0
		END
	ELSE
		BEGIN
			--YENİ ATAMA YAPILACAK
			
			SET @C=ISNULL((SELECT TOP 1 NUMARA FROM SEVKBEKLEME WITH(NOLOCK) WHERE STATUS=0 AND BLOKE=0 AND AMBAR_KODU=@AK AND ISNULL(SB_REF,0)=0),0)
			--SELECT @C,@AK
			IF @C=0 
				BEGIN	
					SET @MSJ='MAKSİMUM SEVK BEKLEME ATAMASI YAPILMIŞ. AMBAR KODU=' + @AK
					GOTO ERR1 
				END
			ELSE
				BEGIN
					SET @NMR=NULL
					SELECT @MAXT=MAX(ATAMA_TARIHI) FROM SEVKBEKLEME WITH(NOLOCK) WHERE STATUS=0 AND BLOKE=0 AND AMBAR_KODU=@AK AND ISNULL(SB_REF,0)=0 
					IF @MAXT IS NULL OR @ORDER=1 BEGIN
						BB1:
						SELECT TOP 1 @NMR=NUMARA FROM SEVKBEKLEME WITH(NOLOCK)  WHERE STATUS=0 AND BLOKE=0 AND AMBAR_KODU=@AK AND ISNULL(MIKTAR,0)=0 AND ISNULL(SB_REF,0)=0 ORDER BY NUMARA 
						IF @NMR IS NULL 
							BEGIN	
								SET @MSJ='MAKSİMUM SEVK BEKLEME ATAMASI YAPILMIŞ.AMBAR KODU=' + @AK
								GOTO ERR1 
							END
						END
					ELSE
						BEGIN
							SELECT TOP 1 @NMR=NUMARA FROM SEVKBEKLEME WITH(NOLOCK) WHERE STATUS=0 AND BLOKE=0 AND AMBAR_KODU=@AK  AND ISNULL(MIKTAR,0)=0 AND ISNULL(SB_REF,0)=0
								AND NUMARA >ISNULL((SELECT TOP 1 NUMARA FROM SEVKBEKLEME WITH(NOLOCK)  WHERE STATUS=0 AND BLOKE=0 AND AMBAR_KODU=@AK AND ISNULL(SB_REF,0)=0 AND ATAMA_TARIHI=@MAXT ORDER BY NUMARA DESC ),0)
							ORDER BY NUMARA 
							IF @NMR IS NULL GOTO BB1
						END

					UPDATE SEVKBEKLEME SET FIRMA_REF=@FIRMA_REF ,MIKTAR=1,LINKREFS='['+CONVERT(NVARCHAR,@PREF)+']',ATAMA_TARIHI=GETDATE() WHERE NUMARA=@NMR  AND STATUS=0 AND BLOKE=0 AND AMBAR_KODU=@AK AND ISNULL(SB_REF,0)=0

					--SELECT @NMR 
				END
		END

    --SELECT  @SB_REF, @AK,@PREF,@NUMARA
    FETCH NEXT FROM MY_CURSOR INTO @AK,@FIRMA_REF,@PREF,@NUMARA
END
ERR1:
CLOSE MY_CURSOR
DEALLOCATE MY_CURSOR
END

IF @MSJ<>'' BEGIN
		ROLLBACK TRANSACTION   
		SELECT 1,@MSJ
 END ELSE BEGIN 
COMMIT TRANSACTION  
SELECT 0,'OK'  
END
END
TRY BEGIN CATCH   
		ROLLBACK TRANSACTION   
		SELECT 1,ERROR_MESSAGE() 
END CATCH
